response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS and Docker, directly aligning with the required stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, API integrations, and scalable systems demonstrates strong architectural skills, while his open-source contributions and workshops reflect exceptional communication and engineering rigor. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, but his broad expertise suggests quick adaptability.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across enterprise-scale applications
Proven track record in AI-agent development and API-driven automation systems
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and CI/CD practices
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks are used
German language skill is only basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles involve legacy or niche tech (e.g., DLang), raising minor questions about focus on modern enterprise stack
